title: 151 Super Glue, Quick Drying, Extra Strong, 4 x 3g Tubes, Non-Drip Formula for Household Repairs
features: QUICK DRYING: Advanced formula ensures rapid bonding within seconds, perfect for urgent household repairs and DIY projects
VERSATILE USE: Effectively bonds metals, ceramics, rubber and most plastics, making it suitable for a wide range of applications
DUAL PACK VALUE: Contains two 3g tubes of super glue, providing excellent value and backup supply for multiple projects
NON-DRIP FORMULA: Precision application with no-mess formula ensures clean and accurate bonding without unwanted drips
GAP FILLING: Specially formulated to work effectively on larger gaps, providing strong and reliable bonds for household repairs
description: Discover the power of 151 Super Glue, a versatile household adhesive that delivers exceptional bonding strength. This pack includes two 3g tubes of quick-drying, extra-strong adhesive featuring a non-drip formula that makes application precise and mess-free. Perfect for all household repairs, this super glue effectively bonds metals, ceramics, rubber, and most plastics. The innovative formula is particularly suitable for larger gaps, ensuring a reliable hold where you need it most. Each tube is designed for easy application and maximum control. Whether you're fixing broken shoes, household items, or ceramics, this adhesive sets quickly to create lasting bonds. The compact tubes are convenient to store and use when needed. Please note: As this is a powerful adhesive, carefully read all instructions before use, as it bonds skin and eyes in seconds. Keep out of reach of children and ensure proper ventilation during use.

specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Ceramics, Household Repairs, Metals, Plastics, Rubber
specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Extra Strong, Non-drip Formula, Quick Drying, Suitable For Larger Gaps
